title: AHZNB's Naruto Seals
description: Makes more keys available for jutsu activation
body:
This mods is a library for Naruto AHZNB's Addons that adds a few keys to bind jutsu on.

**Feel free to join DecentStudio Discord server for any questions, to stay updated or to order a mod/plugin:** https://discord.gg/MdFpAjPqpX
